title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston... screen Cancel button
scenario: Tapping Cancel on the "Houston..." error screen after a failed DFU does not return the user to the connected device home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Navigate to the Device Settings screen for the connected device.
5. During the first 20% of the update, turn off the headset (or turn off internet before tapping Start Update) to cause the DFU to fail.
6. Observe the 'Houston...' screen with a Cancel button.
expected: The user is returned to the Home screen for the currently connected device.
